mapper.select: select * from batch.data_quality_rule where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and enabled = true and #{businessKey} like (scope_business_key || '%')
mapper.update: update batch.data_quality_rule set rule_name = #{ruleName}, rule_type = #{ruleType}, scope_business_key = #{scopeBusinessKey}, expression = #{expression}, threshold_json = #{thresholdJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, severity = #{severity}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
